word: H2992 - יָבַם - yâbam - yaw-bam' - Perform the duty of a husband's brother

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Perform the duty of a husband's brother

יבם - yâbam - yaw-bam'

A primitive root of doubtful meaning; used only as a denominative from H2993; to marry a (deceased) brother’s widow: - perform the duty of a husband’s brother, marry.
